summary.en: EU requires PV modules to meet EN IEC 61730-1 (construction requirements) and EN IEC 61730-2 (testing requirements) for safety qualification under CE marking via the Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU). Safety classes (SC I, SC II) and application classes (A, B, C) must be declared. Perovskite and tandem modules must pass the same framework; no dedicated perovskite sub-standard yet exists within IEC 61730 as of 2026.
summary.zh: 欧盟要求光伏组件符合EN IEC 61730-1（结构要求）和EN IEC 61730-2（测试要求），通过低压指令（LVD 2014/35/EU）CE标志下的安全认证。须声明安全等级（SC I、SC II）和应用等级（A、B、C）。截至2026年，IEC 61730框架下尚无钙钛矿专项子标准。
summary.zht: 歐盟要求光伏組件符合EN IEC 61730-1（結構要求）和EN IEC 61730-2（測試要求），通過低壓指令（LVD 2014/35/EU）CE標誌下的安全認證。須聲明安全等級（SC I、SC II）和應用等級（A、B、C）。截至2026年，IEC 61730框架下尚無鈣鈦礦專項子標準。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61730-1:2018+A11:2020 (PV module safety qualification Part 1: requirements for construction)
EN IEC 61730-2:2018+A11:2020 (PV module safety qualification Part 2: requirements for testing)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 37409-2019 (equivalent to IEC 61730-1/-2) for PV module safety qualification. CQC or CGC third-party certification is common for domestic market access. No separate perovskite safety qualification standard exists under GB/T as of 2026. [UNVERIFIED: current enforcement scope for perovskite modules under GB/T 37409]
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 37409-2019（等同IEC 61730-1/-2）进行光伏组件安全认证。CQC或CGC第三方认证在国内市场准入中较为普遍。截至2026年，GB/T体系下尚无钙钛矿专项安全认证标准。[UNVERIFIED：GB/T 37409对钙钛矿组件的执行范围]
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 37409-2019（等同IEC 61730-1/-2）進行光伏組件安全認證。CQC或CGC第三方認證在國內市場準入中較為普遍。截至2026年，GB/T體系下尚無鈣鈦礦專項安全認證標準。[UNVERIFIED：GB/T 37409對鈣鈦礦組件的執行範圍]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37409-2019 (photovoltaic module safety qualification, equivalent to IEC 61730)

gap.en: Perovskite and tandem PV modules present novel safety risks not fully covered by IEC 61730: potential lead or other heavy-metal leakage, faster moisture ingress, and encapsulant compatibility issues. CE marking requires demonstrated compliance with EN IEC 61730, but no perovskite-specific safety addendum has been harmonised under the LVD as of 2026. Exporters should engage a notified body early. [UNVERIFIED: whether any perovskite-specific harmonised standard is in draft under CEN/CENELEC]
gap.zh: 钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件存在IEC 61730尚未完全覆盖的新型安全风险：铅或其他重金属潜在泄漏、水分渗入加速及封装材料兼容性问题。CE标志要求符合EN IEC 61730，但截至2026年，LVD框架下尚无经协调的钙钛矿专项安全附录。出口商应尽早联系公告机构。[UNVERIFIED：CEN/CENELEC是否有钙钛矿专项协调标准草案]
gap.zht: 鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件存在IEC 61730尚未完全覆蓋的新型安全風險：鉛或其他重金屬潛在洩漏、水分滲入加速及封裝材料相容性問題。CE標誌要求符合EN IEC 61730，但截至2026年，LVD框架下尚無經協調的鈣鈦礦專項安全附錄。出口商應盡早聯繫公告機構。[UNVERIFIED：CEN/CENELEC是否有鈣鈦礦專項協調標準草案]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking under EU Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU) for EU market access
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 37409); mandatory CQC/CGC certification for certain subsidy programmes and grid-connection approvals

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. EU market access for perovskite/tandem PV modules requires CE marking demonstrating conformity with EN IEC 61730-1/-2 under the LVD. No dedicated perovskite safety harmonised standard exists as of 2026; the standard framework applies by default. Engage a notified body for a pre-assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。钙钛矿/叠层光伏组件进入欧盟市场，须通过CE标志证明符合LVD下的EN IEC 61730-1/-2。截至2026年，尚无专门的钙钛矿安全协调标准；现行标准框架默认适用。建议提前联系公告机构进行预评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。鈣鈦礦/疊層光伏組件進入歐盟市場，須通過CE標誌證明符合LVD下的EN IEC 61730-1/-2。截至2026年，尚無專門的鈣鈦礦安全協調標準；現行標準框架默認適用。建議提前聯繫公告機構進行預評估。

requirement_topic.en: PV Module Design Qualification and Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏组件设计鉴定与型式认证
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏組件設計鑒定與型式認證

summary.en: EU requires PV modules to undergo design qualification and type approval per EN IEC 61215-1 (requirements) and EN IEC 61215-2 (test procedures), harmonised under the CE marking framework. For perovskite and tandem modules, the standard damp-heat (1000 h at 85 C/85% RH), thermal cycling (200 cycles), UV preconditioning, and humidity-freeze tests pose significant challenges due to inherent perovskite instability. IEC TS 63209 (extended stress testing) is additionally relevant as a guide for more demanding reliability evaluation of emerging PV technologies including perovskite.
summary.zh: 欧盟要求光伏组件依据EN IEC 61215-1（要求）和EN IEC 61215-2（测试程序）进行设计鉴定与型式认证，并在CE标志框架下协调适用。对于钙钛矿及叠层组件，受限于材料固有的不稳定性，标准湿热测试（85摄氏度/85%RH，1000小时）、热循环（200次）、紫外预处理及湿冻测试均面临重大挑战。IEC TS 63209（延伸应力测试）亦作为更严格可靠性评估的参考指南，尤其适用于包括钙钛矿在内的新兴光伏技术。
summary.zht: 歐盟要求光伏組件依據EN IEC 61215-1（要求）和EN IEC 61215-2（測試程序）進行設計鑒定與型式認證，並在CE標誌框架下協調適用。對於鈣鈦礦及疊層組件，受限於材料固有的不穩定性，標準濕熱測試（85攝氏度/85%RH，1000小時）、熱循環（200次）、紫外預處理及濕凍測試均面臨重大挑戰。IEC TS 63209（延伸應力測試）亦作為更嚴格可靠性評估的參考指南，尤其適用於包括鈣鈦礦在內的新興光伏技術。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61215-1:2021 (terrestrial PV modules - design qualification and type approval Part 1: test requirements)
EN IEC 61215-2:2021 (terrestrial PV modules - design qualification and type approval Part 2: test procedures)
IEC TS 63209-1:2021 (extended stress testing for PV modules Part 1: system)
IEC TS 63209-2:2021 (extended stress testing for PV modules Part 2: modules) [UNVERIFIED: exact publication year and scope]

summary.en: China uses GB/T 9535 (based on older IEC 61215 for crystalline silicon) for PV module design qualification. A direct perovskite or tandem PV design qualification standard equivalent to EN IEC 61215 has not been established under GB/T as of 2026. Domestic manufacturers targeting EU export must comply with EN IEC 61215; Chinese GB/T certification alone is insufficient for CE marking. [UNVERIFIED: whether updated GB/T equivalent to IEC 61215:2021 has been published]
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 9535（基于旧版IEC 61215晶硅标准）进行光伏组件设计鉴定。截至2026年，GB/T体系下尚未建立针对钙钛矿或叠层光伏组件的设计鉴定等效标准。面向欧盟出口的国内制造商须符合EN IEC 61215；仅持有中国GB/T认证不足以满足CE标志要求。[UNVERIFIED：与IEC 61215:2021等效的更新版GB/T是否已发布]
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 9535（基於舊版IEC 61215晶矽標準）進行光伏組件設計鑒定。截至2026年，GB/T體系下尚未建立針對鈣鈦礦或疊層光伏組件的設計鑒定等效標準。面向歐盟出口的國內製造商須符合EN IEC 61215；僅持有中國GB/T認證不足以滿足CE標誌要求。[UNVERIFIED：與IEC 61215:2021等效的更新版GB/T是否已發布]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9535-1998 (crystalline silicon terrestrial PV modules - design qualification and type approval, based on IEC 61215:1993) [UNVERIFIED: whether superseded by newer edition]

gap.en: Perovskite and tandem PV modules face a significant type-approval gap: the standard IEC 61215 test sequences (damp-heat 1000 h, 200 thermal cycles, UV) were designed for mature crystalline silicon technology. Perovskite degradation under these conditions can be rapid, making pass/fail outcomes uncertain. IEC TS 63209 provides extended stress sequences but is a technical specification, not a harmonised standard for CE purposes. No dedicated perovskite or tandem design qualification standard is harmonised under the EU CPR or LVD as of 2026. China lacks a GB/T equivalent to current IEC 61215-1/-2 that covers perovskite, creating a dual-compliance burden for exporters. [UNVERIFIED: IEC TC82 perovskite working group publication timeline]
gap.zh: 钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件面临显著的型式认证缺口：IEC 61215标准测试序列（湿热1000小时、200次热循环、紫外）专为成熟晶硅技术设计，钙钛矿在这些条件下可能迅速降解，导致通过率不确定。IEC TS 63209提供了延伸应力序列，但仅为技术规范，并非CE意义上的协调标准。截至2026年，欧盟CPR或LVD框架下尚无针对钙钛矿或叠层组件的设计鉴定专项协调标准。中国亦缺乏覆盖钙钛矿的GB/T版IEC 61215-1/-2等效标准，增加了出口商的双重合规负担。[UNVERIFIED：IEC TC82钙钛矿工作组发布时间表]
gap.zht: 鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件面臨顯著的型式認證缺口：IEC 61215標準測試序列（濕熱1000小時、200次熱循環、紫外）專為成熟晶矽技術設計，鈣鈦礦在這些條件下可能迅速降解，導致通過率不確定。IEC TS 63209提供了延伸應力序列，但僅為技術規範，並非CE意義上的協調標準。截至2026年，歐盟CPR或LVD框架下尚無針對鈣鈦礦或疊層組件的設計鑒定專項協調標準。中國亦缺乏覆蓋鈣鈦礦的GB/T版IEC 61215-1/-2等效標準，增加了出口商的雙重合規負擔。[UNVERIFIED：IEC TC82鈣鈦礦工作組發布時間表]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking under EU framework (harmonised under LVD or Construction Products Regulation depending on application); required for market access in EU
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 9535); not yet mandatory specifically for perovskite; mandatory type-testing required for national subsidy and grid-connection programmes

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Perovskite and tandem PV modules exported to the EU must pass EN IEC 61215-1/-2 design qualification for CE marking. The standard test sequences present particular challenges for perovskite stability; IEC TS 63209 extended stress tests are advisory. No dedicated harmonised perovskite standard exists as of 2026. Chinese GB/T 9535 certification alone does not satisfy EU requirements. Exporters should conduct pre-qualification testing and engage EU notified bodies early.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。出口欧盟的钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件须通过EN IEC 61215-1/-2设计鉴定以获得CE标志。标准测试序列对钙钛矿稳定性提出特殊挑战；IEC TS 63209延伸应力测试为建议性规范。截至2026年，尚无专门的协调钙钛矿标准。中国GB/T 9535认证单独不满足欧盟要求。出口商应尽早开展预鉴定测试并联系欧盟公告机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。出口歐盟的鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件須通過EN IEC 61215-1/-2設計鑒定以獲得CE標誌。標準測試序列對鈣鈦礦穩定性提出特殊挑戰；IEC TS 63209延伸應力測試為建議性規範。截至2026年，尚無專門的協調鈣鈦礦標準。中國GB/T 9535認證單獨不滿足歐盟要求。出口商應盡早開展預鑒定測試並聯繫歐盟公告機構。
